name: ExtensionRequirements_DerivedFrom
title: R5: Other set of Requirements this builds on (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Requirements.derivedFrom` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Requirements.derivedFrom` 0..* `canonical(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Requirements)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `Requirements.derivedFrom` 0..* `canonical(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Requirements)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Requirements.derivedFrom` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Requirements` is not mapped.
Element `Requirements.derivedFrom` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Other set of Requirements this builds on (new)

Existing statements (by key) may be narrowed or clarified, and additional statements added.
